Cresie Beilar

Infobox

Cresie Beilar

Basic Information
Type Stat
Status Alive
Player Catherine
Pronouns She/Her
Species Rust Troll
Age 18
Magic Pharos
Home Polnareff's Palace
Affiliation The Crunch Crack Pirate Crew, The Outsiders
Occupation Freelance Adventurer
Current Location Renexann
Known Languages Remnillian, Common, myhtaia trollian, Infernal
Dates
Type Stat
Born 16th of Dremfel, 999 ME
Place of Birth New Dougleton
Died -
Place of Death -
Circumstances of Death -
Family
Type Stat
Adoptive Parent Becquerel
Son Kimera Coolington
Physical Description
Type Stat
Hair Black and Red massive mane going all the way down her back
Eyes Yellow sclera with black eyes
Height 5'7'' with horns
Weight 167lbs
Skintone Grey stone
5th Edition Rules
Type Stat
Class Paladin
Subclass Oath of the Open Sea
Level 10
Ability Scores
Type stat stat
STR DEX CON
15 5 14
INT WIS CHA
16 14 18

Cresie Beilar is a Rust Troll whose lived a life of crime. She's been used to killing due to growing up surrounded by it, but she's moved past that and decided killing isn't always the solution. During her travels with The Crunch Crack Pirate Crew she made an oath to Luffism and became a Paladin of the religion

Personality

Backstory

Cresie was born around New Dougleton and raised by a neglectful white horse named Becquerel in a strange house outside the city. Becquerel died when Cresie was 11 in a fire caused by a cult. She got involved with some of the crime in the city to get by due to her strong physique. Around this time she started experimenting with gender presentation and clothing. When she was 13, the Crunch Crack Pirate Crew robbed a building she was guarding. as they were leaving Cresie tried to join them because they were lead by a badass pirate troll woman and Briska Johnsn let her join because you don't see other trolls often, and especially not ones as young as Cresie so much anymore. As she became integrated in the crew, they helped her explore her gender presentation, and steal the means to transition. Eventually Joshi used a stolen scroll to perform transmogrification on her. Many people have been disintegrated in Cresie's pursuit of transition.

She got along well with most of the crew, except The Joker, and Briska was pretty hard on her.

During her time on the crew she became a bit of a cold blooded killer. she killed nearly a hundred people while on the crew, and watched hundreds more die by her crews hands. It didn't matter to her, they didn't matter to her. Obstacles in the way of her and her crews goals.

Eventually she was ousted from the crew after stealing a bundle of bananas went really badly and she somehow ended up getting a fucking bounty of 3cp for it.

Then she met the party. She journeyed with them for a while longer, killed a bunch more people, and eventually had an experience where she woke up with the party in a strange in on another planet. They talked to the owner of the inn and the party met April Gallagher. Eventually they went into the sewers to deal with a swarm of rats, which ended up turning into the rat king who was a bloody and contorted mess of a being. On their second day the party fought a ghost possessing some mannequins. On the third they headed to a tavern a few hours out to find the Eye of Space. They got it from a tavernkeep after defeating a demon. The party then headed back to the Inn to find out that everyone was missing. They searched the place and they found clones of themselves which they had to kill, the only one who had to kill themself, was Cresie. Killing herself in this way and having to see her own lifeless body, caused by her own hands, radically altered her perception and outlook on reality. a short time later the bodies fizzled away and converged in the main room into a strange fusion of Alberich and Niles Norales. April Gallagher was knocked out a window but managed to climb back up and used a powerful spell of the gallagher clan which managed to expose a weak point on the bizarre creature so it could be slain. The party inserted the eye of space into the idol and it sent them back to Mytharia. The eye itself is the crystalised eye of a titan, but folding space in this way used up the last of its power.

Eventually in Hillsville, most of the party found themself overtaken by a strange magical effect. Being the arrogant adventurers they are, they all let the effect overtake them as they were swallowed by blue curtains and whisked away to Volteya. Cresie however, did not share in their hubris and did not allow the effect to overtake her, as she stood there, in the field, alone.

With her party vanished she stayed in Hillsville the night, then left the next dawn. She assumed the party was dead, and that she needed to keep moving. So, she headed toward Rexaulia, specifically Renexann, where the party had been heading before. Along the way she ran into Kali on the road by complete chance. They then decided to travel together toward Renexann.

On the way to Rextaulia, while in the mountains, Cresie and Kali got into a scuffle with some bandits. The bandits were much stronger than your average bandits. One of them was a Pharos who had acquired a bitch arrow and was planning to attune with it when they got to a safe location. However, during the fight Cresie cut off one of their arms and the arrow fell to the ground. The bandit clambered to pick it up as fast as possible and Cresie grabbed them to find out what was going on. With only one weapon in hand, the bandit slashed into Cresie's wrist and broke from her grasp. She fell into a breakdown as the remaining bandits ran away. Kali tried to comfort Cresie during the breakdown, and it's the thought that counts. Once Cresie recovered it left her with more resolve to do good in this world. The duo eventually made it to Renexann and started picking up bounties and jobs working themselves to the bones for money. This caused them to grow a bit of a reputation in the area. Whenever they needed a scroll or potion for the job, the two shopped at The Paw'In Shop.

Goals

Notable Abilities

Magical Doctor

Magical Doctor is Cresie's Shadow Bitch, it takes the form of a second set of arms and when she touches another creature it allows her to channel her energy into another creature. Additionally it allows her to exert her energy to channel more into her strikes.
Aura of Martyrdom. As a bonus action, Cresie can activate her Aura of Martyrdom. Immediately her hit point maximum is reduced by half and her current hit points are reduced by the same number as her hit point maximum. Until Cresie is knocked unconscious, her Strength Score becomes 25, she is considered one size larger for the sake of grappling and carryweight, and the number she needs to roll to crit is reduced by 2.
Lay on Blood. As an action, Cresie can channel her own hit points into another creature she touches. She takes an amount of damage of her choice that cannot be reduced in any way, and the creature she is touching regains that amount of hit points.
Martyr's Medicine. Cresie's shadow bitch imbues her with the power of a martyr, as such allowing her to cast the following spells using her own hit points like martyrous spellcasting. She can cast an amount of these spells in this way equal to her proficiency bonus each day.

Spell Level Point Cost
1st 5
2nd 10
3rd 20
4th 30
5th 45
